pi_items.source: Sygic GPS Navigation official documentation and task description
Sygic GPS Navigation official documentation showing these are separate avoidance settings (Avoid ferries, Avoid toll roads, Avoid unpaved roads) distinct from motorway avoidance
Code analysis of setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which create and populate /sdcard/task_data/initial_prefs/ and /sdcard/task_data/final_prefs/ directories, not /sdcard/task_data/shared_prefs

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Sygic GPS Navigation (com.sygic.aura) to avoid motorways by modifying shared preferences. Target keywords (motorway, highway, avoid, routing) are verified as relevant to Sygic GPS avoidance settings found in Menu > Settings > Route & Navigation. Negative keywords (ferry, toll, unpaved) are verified as separate, distinct avoidance options in the same settings menu. Data comes from real Android shared preferences files of the Sygic app, not synthetic data. Task captures initial and final preference states at /sdcard/task_data/initial_prefs/ and /sdcard/task_data/final_prefs/ respectively. Verification runs via verifier.py::verify_avoid_motorways which compares preference file diffs and analyzes UI trajectory frames.
